additionalData.neet_ug_code_01: A candidate who is appearing in the qualifying examination, i.e., 12 Standard in 2026 whose result is awaited may apply and take up the said test but he/she shall not be eligible for admission to the MBBS or BDS, if he/she does not pass the qualifying examination with the required pass percentage of marks at the time of first round of Counseling.
additionalData.neet_ug_code_03: The Intermediate/Pre-degree Examination in Science of an Indian University/Board or other recognized examining body with Physics, Chemistry, Biology /Bio-technology (which shall include practical test in these subjects) and also English as a compulsory subject
additionalData.neet_ug_code_04: The Pre-professional/Pre-medical Examination with Physics ,Chemistry, Biology/Bio-technology & English after passing either the Higher Secondary Examination or the Pre-University or an equivalent examination. The Pre-professional/Pre-medical examination shall include practical test in these subjects and also English as a compulsory subject.
additionalData.neet_ug_code_05: The first year of the three years’ degree course of a recognized University with Physics, Chemistry and Biology/Bio-technology including practical tests in these subjects provided the examination is a University Examination and candidate has passed the earlier qualifying examination with Physics, Chemistry, Biology/Bio-Technology with English at a level not less than a core course.
additionalData.neet_ug_code_06: B.Sc.Examination of an Indian University provided that he/she has passed the B.Sc.Examination with not less than two of the subjects Physics, Chemistry, Biology (Botany, Zoology)/Bio-technology and further that he/she has passed the earlier qualifying examination with Physics,Chemistry,Biology and English.

jobs.ai_h1: UPSC IES & ISS Recruitment 2026: 44 Vacancy Notification Open | Apply Online Abhi!
jobs.ai_title: UPSC Indian Economic Service IES & ISS Recruitment 2026 Notification
jobs.ai_meta_description: UPSC ne 44 post ke liye IES aur ISS Recruitment 2026 shuru kiya hai. Ye sabhi vacancies online apply karne ke liye aavashyak hain.
jobs.ai_overview: Ye achanak khabar UPSC ke liye hain jinhein 44 posts ke liye IES aur ISS Recruitment 2026 shuru karne ke liye puchh rahe hain. Agar aap bhi IES aur ISS mein join hone ka sapna dekhte hain, toh aapko zaroor online registration karni hogi kyonki in posts ke liye online form hi bharna hoga.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: UPSC ne IES aur ISS ke liye 44 posts ki notification aaj release ki hai. Ismein 21 se 30 varsh ki umr ke yuvak-yuvatiko ko shamil hone ki sazan hain. ISE mein 16 aur ISS mein 28 posts shamil hain.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Kisi bhi vyakti ko jinhone Post Graduate / Master Degree in Economics / Applied Economics / Business Economics / Econometric ya Statistics/Mathematical Statistics/Applied Statistics mein graduation ki hai, ve is recruitment ka online form fill kar sakte hain.
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: IES aur ISS ka exam donon ek hi din mein hoga. Donon exams mein paper I aur II hota hai. Dono par questions economic aur statistic ke topics par aayenge. Tatha, aapko paper I mein economics ke topic jaise micro econometrics, econometrics, national income, public finance, growth development, macro economics, agricultural economics, labour economics, international trade, money banking, public finance, international trade on ka exam karne honge jo ki IES ke liye hoga, aur ISME paper II par statistics ke questions hota hai jaise sampling, statistical inference, time series analysis, index numbers, multiple regression, etc. ISS ke candidates ko paper II par statistic aur math ke concept jaise statistical inference, time series analysis, probability distribution, sampling theory, index numbers, multiple regression analysis, and statistical techniques ke questions solve karne honge. ISE exam mein total marks 300 hote hain aur ISS exam mein total 300 marks hote hain. Ab, yadi aap bhi exam clear karna chahte hain, toh apne syllabus ko pehle se padh lein aur practice shuru karein.
jobs.ai_salary_insights: Selected candidates ko in-hand salary ki bhi badi khaasish hogi. ISE mein selected candidates ko in-hand salary ki range 70,000 - 1,00,000 hoga. Iske alawa, unhein DA, TA, etc. ki facilities bhi milti hain. Jab talk IES ki to, ISS ke selected canddies in-hand salary ki range 56,100 - 1,77,500 hoga, jo ke DA, TA, etc. ke sath milti hain.
jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: Selected candidates ISE ke liye kaam karne ke liye UPSC, Government of India ke office mein 9-5 job karengi, jahaan ve ek adhikari ke roop mein kaam karenge. Unhein economic policies aur plans ke bare mein vichardhara aur vichar karne honge, tatha government ke financial budgeting planning aur decision making mein bhi bhag lenge. ISS ke selected candidates ki job profile ISS office, Government of India ke office me 9-5 job hoti hai, jaha unhe Statistical data mein upyog krke economic growth, statistics, etc mein help karni hogi, tatha government ke statistics department mein vichardhara karni hogi.
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: Selection strategy k liye candidates ko yeh tips follow karein ki unhe paper I aur II dono ke syllabus ko carefully read karein aur dono exam ke liye thoda preparation karein jo ki ISE se related hai agar aap ISE apply kar rahe hai, ya agr aap ISS apply kar rahai hai toh uske liye thoda syllabus ko padhe aur practice karein. Iske alawa, candidates ko syllabus ka proper mapping karna hoga, aur high negative markings wale questions se bachna hoga.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite: Candidates ko kuch simple steps follow karna hoga, jinhone UPSC IES, ISS recruitment 2026 k liye apply to karna hai: (1) Candidate ko OTR registration karne ka avsar diya jayega (2) candidates ko log in karna hoga (3) candidate ne online form apply karna hoga  (4) candidate ka document uplabdh hona hai (5) candidates ko form bharte waqt yeh dhyan rakhein ke unke sabhi documents vah correct hain jo ki aapke pass hain  aur jahaan aapka address aadhaar card bank passbook ya kisi bhi pramanik pata hone par vichar karein  (6), candidate ka ek account open karna padega jo ki bank ke liye hoga (7) candidate ko online payment ka avsar milayega (8) candidate ne form ka print karni hoga aur bank ko submit karna hoga.

jobs.ai_overview: Agar aap bhi is bharti ka intezar kar rahe the, toh aapke liye acchi khabar hai! MPESB ne is saal ki Van Rakshak, Kshetra Rakshak & Jail Prahari Bharti ki official gazette notification 22 June ko jari ki hai. Ismein 1679 post ke liye aavedan karne ki avsari di gayi hai. Aap online form 28 February se 30 April tak bhare sakte hain.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: Ye recruitment ek mahaan avsari hai jo ke aapko is prakar ki naye career option pradaan karti hai. Agar aapke paas Class 10th ki padhai ki padti hai aur aap MP mein rehna chahte hain, toh iska labh uthaen. Is recruitment ka competition jyada hai, isliye aapko thorough preparation karne ki zarurat hai. Ismein physical test aur written test dono ke liye aavedan kiya ja sakta hai.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Aapko is recruitment ka labh uthaen agar aapko MP mein rahna hai aur aapke paas Class 10th ki padhai ki padti hai. Iske alawa, yadi aapko physical test aur written test dono ki taiyaari karne mein pasandida hai, toh bhi aap iska labh uthaen. Kshetra Rakshak aadi post ke liye aavedan karne ke liye aapko 18-33 age ki limit hai.
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: Aapko is recruitment ka labh uthaen agar aapne paas 6 month ke liye physical workout kiya hai aur aapki written test ki taiyaari karne mein pasandida hai. jobs.ai_title: DRDO CEPTAM 11 Recruitment 2026: 760+ Senior Posts Available
jobs.ai_meta_description: DRDO CEPTAM 11 Recruitment 2026: Eligibility, Salary, & Selection Process.
jobs.ai_overview: Agar aap bhi is bharti ka intezar kar rahe the, toh aapke liye acchi khabar hai. Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO) ne CEPTAM 11 Recruitment 2026 ke liye 760+ senior posts ki bharti announce ki hai. Is bharti ke liye, aapko senior technical assistant ke liye Bachelor ka degree ya diploma ke saath related trade ka certificate hona chahiye.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: Iss bharti ka avasar kheenchne ke liye aapko pahle 18 jun 2026 ke tarik par 28 varsh ka umra ka hona chahiye. Ye competition level ka mukhya kaarak hai. Aapko vacancy details ki jarurath hogi. Ismein Senior Technical Assistant STA - B 561 aur Technician - A (Tech A) 203 posts ki vacancies hain. Ye bhi yehi kaarana hai ki aapko syllabus aur pattern ka accha pata hona chahiye. Aur unki difficulty level ka analysis karna zarooret hai.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Iss Bharti ka avasar wale aayuwar 18 aur 28 ke beech hon. Yeh unka qualification degree ya related trade ki diploma honi chahiye. Ismein aapko age aur gender ke koi baap naa ho. Lekin yeh bhi yeh kaarana hai ki aapko is qualification ka saath saath related trade ka certificate bhi hona chahiye. Iska arth yeh hai ki agar aap 10th ka exam pass kar chuke hain, to aapko ITI certificate milna zaroori hai.
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: Preparation tips yaad rakhen: 1. Syllabus padhe aur isko practice karein. 2. Online resources ka upyog karen. 3. Mock tests lein aur apni performance ka self-evaluation karein.
jobs.ai_salary_insights: Salary insights ko dekhte hue, DRDO ke employees ko in-hand salaray ki shuruwaat ke bare mein yeh bataya gaya hai ki iska minimum limit 25000/- hai aur maximum 90000/- ka limit hai.
jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: Job profile anubhav karein: Ye senior technical assistants aur technicians aise karyawaalon ka kaam karte hain jo DRDO ke sahyog ke liye karyon ko tay karate hain. Ismein unki shiksha aur kaushal ki jarurat hoti hai.
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: Selection strategy ko pate hue, aapko iske 2 stage hain. Pehele stage mein aapko online computer-based test clear karna hoga. Iske baad, aapko interview ke liye call mil sakta hai. Is interview mein aapko apne kaushal aur shiksha ka proof dene ki jarurat hogi.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite: How to apply online rewrite yaad rakhen: 1. Official website pe jaayein aur apply online button pe click karein. 2. Registration form bharne ke liye required documents upload karein. 3. Online test ke liye registration karein aur pay fee. 4. Interview ke liye call lein aur interview ke liye taiyaar ho jayein.

jobs.ai_overview: Agar aap bhi is SSC Delhi Police Head Constable AWO / TPO Recruitment 2025 ki tarah ki bharti ke liye apne aapko taiyar kar rahe hain aur aapke paas 10+2 Intermediate ke bare me qualification hai, to yah aavashyak news aapke liye achhi hain. Is recruitment ke madhyam se SSC 552 Post ka selection karna ji raha hai, jo ki Assistant Wireless Operator (AWO) aur Tele Printer Operator (TPO) ke liye hai.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: Is recruitment ke liye 370 Post Male aur 182 Post Female ke liye release ki gayi hain. Form bharte waqt aapko yeh dhyan rakhna hoga ki aap 10+2 Intermediate ki qualification ke alawa Science & Mathematics ka subject hamesha se se padhe hain. Aapke paas NTC Certificate Mechanic Cum Operator Electronic Communication System ki bhi hona hoga. Aapke selection ke liye Physical Test bhi hoga, jismein aapka height aur chest ka measurement lagega.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Yeh recruitment ke liye vah log apply kar sakte hain, jo ki 18 saal se 27 saal ka hain, aur unhe SSC (Staff Selection Commission) ki official website par registration karne ki aavashyakta hai. Unhein 10+2 Intermediate ki qualification aur Science & Mathematics ka subject hamesha se se padhne ki aavashyakta hai. Physical Test pass hone ke liye aapko yeh dhyan rakhna hoga.
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: Is exam ke liye aapko Physical Test ke liye taiyar rahna hoga, jismein aapka height aur chest ka measurement lagega. Agar aapko physical ke liye koi samasya aati hai, to aapko doctor ke paas jaakar apne daktar ke pas consult karke Physical Test pass karne ki salah mangni chahiye.
jobs.ai_salary_insights: Chayan ke baad koi vyakti Head Constable AWO / TPO ke roop mein recruit ho jaye to unki monthly salary lagbhag 44,900 tak pahunch sakti hai, aur inki in-hand salary unka 35,000 se 40,000 tak pahunch sakti hai. Alag-alag post ke liye unke salary ki jankari SSC ki official website se mil sakti hai.
jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: Head Constable AWO / TPO ki main job karna hoga Police ki duty mein. Vah police ke liye wireless communication systems use karta hoga aur apne senior officers ke liye report bhi deta hoga. Unki main duty duty hain police ki, kuchh aise case hai jo unki sune aur solve karne ki aavashyakta hoti hai.
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: SSC Delhi Police Head Constable AWO / TPO Recruitment 2025 ke liye aapko exam ke syllabus aur paper pattern ke baare me jaanena hoga. Aapko exam ke question paper par focus rakhna hoga aur apne answer sahi dene ki koshish karna hoga. Agar aapko physical ke liye koi samasya aati hai, to aapko doctor ke paas jaakar apne daktar ke pas consult karke Physical Test pass karne ki salah mangni chahiye.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite: Aap SSC ki official website par login karein aur apply online form bharne ki process shuru karein. Aapke pass aavashyak documents upload karne honge aur aapke aapko aavashyak fee dene honge. Agar aapke form mein koi error ya samasya aati hai, to aapko form correction date par correction karne ki aavashyakta hai

jobs.ai_overview: Agar aap bhi is SSC GD Konstebel Bharti ka intezar kar rahe the toh kewal 12th Pass ho aur aapke paas 18 - 23 varsh ki umar hai. Yaha pe aapke liye saari jaruri jaankari hai.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: Yaad rakhiye kyunki yeh exam ek bada competition hai aur 7.5 lakte se adhik marks karega. Aapki physical test bhi bahut mahatvapoorn hai. Agar aapke pas 8.5 minute mein ek km ka doriya ho toh aapko bhi pasandida hai.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Ab kya hai aapke liye? Jab tak ki aapke 12th pass karne ke baad 18 - 23 varsh ki umar se aap aam hain toh aap SSC GD Konstebel ka bharta kar sakte hai. Jab tak aapke paas SSC GD Konstebel ke liye jaruri qualification hoti hai, tab tak aap SSC GD Bharti ka bharta kar sakte hai.
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: Form bharte waqt in baaton ka khas dhyan rakhein: apne application form mein correct information daalein, photo aur signature daalein, form bharti ke liye sabhi documents upload karein, aapke pas valid adhar card hoga toh uss ka use aap form bharte samay kar sakte hain. Jab aapka form complete ho jayga, toh aapko ek registration number mil jayega, use apne admit card prapt karne ke liye aap upyog kar sakte hain.
jobs.ai_salary_insights: Agar aap SSC GD Konstebel ka bharta karke select hote hain, toh aapke monthly salary par 21700 rupaye ka pahnuka hota hai. Jab hum iss pahnukay ka paryavaran maangenge, toh aapki actual salary 31,169 rupaye tak jaayegi.
jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: Aapke pass SSC GD Konstebel Kaam karne se aap ke liye ek secure job milti hai. Apne paas pehle se se purn aavashyak yogyata honi chahiye, ismein apke liye yahi sirf karna hoga.
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: Ab aapko apne syllabus ki taiyaari karni padegi, unke liye sabhi topics aur chapters par focus karke chaliye. Aap apne physical test mein bhi acchi performance dein. Jab aapke pas sabse badi ummeed hai, tab aapko apne result chunna hoga.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite: Yeh khas tareeke se aapke apply karne ke liye jaruri hai: Aapke paas to apna valid mobile number aur email id hona chahiye jo aapke sath sata rahe hai. Aapko 500 rupaye ka application fee dene honge. Aapko kuch kuch correct information fill karne honge. Aapko saath mein ek copy of photo aur signature dekar ek file ready karke rakhna hoga.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Maine yeh khata kar diya, ab kya karein?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Agar aapne yeh khata kardiya hai, toh aapko apne account mein login karke apna application form update karne padega, apne form mein jo galati thi, use saaf karke upyog kare, aur form bharta wakht ke ande se apne document ko add karein.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Main kitne arthik vikaas ke liye yeh job chunega?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Yeh job mei aapke liye ek secure job aur thodi thodi vridhi se bharna jayega. Main kaha raha hoon ki apne liye job chunein jo aapke liye pasand hai aur jismein aapko kuch saath aane wali vridhi ho.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Mujhe kaise jaankari milegi ki mere application form ke review huiye hain ya nahi?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Agar aapke paas login id hai, toh aapko apne account mein login karke apne application form ke status check kar sakte hai, jo ki aapke paas form bharte wakhaat mei de diya jayega.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Mere question hai ke SSC GD Constable ka selection process kon se kriteyom se hota hai?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: SSC GD Constable ka selection process Physical Standard Test (PST), Physical Efficiency Test (PET), Document Verification, Medical Examination ke roop mein hota hai.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Mujhe SSC GD Konstebel ka selection hoga ya na?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Agar aapke paas pass ho gaya hai, aap apne kshetra aur aapke liye pass ho gaye candidates wala kshetra ke liye selected ho sakte hai. Aapke paas valid document aur sahi physical standard ho taiyaar honi chahiye.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Meri question hai ki SSC GD Konstebel ka salary kitna hai?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: SSC GD Konstebel ka 1st ya 2nd ya 3rd ya 4th arthik vriksh mei, aapke monthly pahnuka 21700 rupaye se lekar 69100 tak jyada ho sakta hai. Yaha pahnuka apne kshetra, post, arthik vikaas, aur experience per depend karta hai. Aap apne kshetra aur post mei aapke liye thoda thoda arthik sahayta milne ki umeed rakhiye.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Mujhe SSC GD Konstebel ka exam ke liye qualification kya karna hota hai?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Agar aap 10th pass 18 - 23 varsh ka ho, tab aap SSC GD Konstebel ka exam de sakte hai. Ab apne paas jo qualification ki koi bhi problem nahi, aap apne liye apne qualification check karke ek achi preparation strategy banayein.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Meri question hai ki koi SSC GD Konstebel ka form free mein fill kar sakta hai ya nahi?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Jab bhi aap apne application form bharein ge, toh aapko application fee ke liye 500 rupaye dena padega. Agar aapka aapke kshetra se exempt hai, toh aapko apne application form bharte samay ek fee exempt certificate bhi diya jayega.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Mujhe yaad nahi hai form bharte samay kis tarah se sahi form download karna hai?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Aapke liye apne browser mei aaiye, aur uske ande mei aapke search engine mei SSC GD Konstebel ka official website search kare, aapke sahi official website par aakar form bharte samay sab kuch jaruri information aapke samne hi hogi.

jobs.ai_meta_description: Rajasthan Staff Selection Board ne Lab Assistant (804 Post) ke liye online aavedan shuru kar diya, ab aapki baari! Jaldi se aawaz uthayein aur apnayen apna Bhagya!
jobs.ai_overview: Agar aap bhi is bharti ka intezar kar rahe the, toh aapke liye acchi khabar hai! Rajasthan Staff Selection Board (RSSB) ne Lab Assistant ke liye 804 post par aavedan shuru kar diya hai. Aap 25 February 2026 se 25 February 2026 tak apne online aavedan online kar sakte hain. Ismein aapne intermediate pasand karne ki avadharanen, aavedan shulk, age relaxation ki jaankari payen ge.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: Ismein aap jankari payenge ki kiya competitive yah recruitment hua hai, ki aapka khel abhi khatam nahin hua hai, aur ki aapka abhi kaafi samay hai. Aapko exam ke liye samay se pehle taiyar rahna hoga taki aap jaldi se online aavaedan online kar sakein.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Is recruitment ka avadharan 18-40 varshon ka intermediate padha hua vyakti hai. Aapka avedan online hoga taki aapko apne vishay pradarshak ke roop men anujnayen mil saken. Iska avadharan online hoga jisse aapko pata chlega ke aapka aavedan kis post par ka hai.
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: Exam ke liye samay se pehle taiyar rahein isliye ki aapko samay doosra ho. Agar aapko lab ke bare men samay niye aane wali hai to vah padhein, samasyen ko samajhne ke liye utarte hain. Aapko kaee prakar ki question mil jayenge, aur aapke samay ka paalan karna hoga. Lab samay samay par hoga, isliye aapko iske bare men aakarshit hona hoga.
jobs.ai_salary_insights: Agar aap selected ho jaate hai toh aapka monthly salary Rs 26,600 per month rahega. Ismein aapka grade pay bhi shamil ho jayega.
jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: Lab Assistant ka kaam kitabon ka review karna, lab ke bare men samay niye aane wali padhai, samasyaon ki jaanch aur samadhan karna. Iska mukhya kaam lab ke madhyam se samay niye aane wali jankari pradaan karna hota hai. Agar aapko kuch samasya aati hai tab aapko aise samne aane ki jaanch aur samadhan karna hota hai.
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: Ab tak aapko 2 paper ke liye jankari mil jayegi. 1st Paper ke liye jankari tab milegi jab aapke pas 10 + 2 (Intermediate) pass ho jaayein, aur doosra paper ke liye jankari tab milegi jab aapke paas 10 + 2 (Intermediate) pass ho jaayein. Abhi aapki 2 paper ke liye jankari aavashyak hai. Doose paper ke liye jankari tab milengi jab aapka 10 + 2 (Intermediate) padhak ka pravaah hoga, aur aapka exam 9-10 May 2026 tak ho jayega.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite:
Online Application Steps:
Aavedan Karne ke liye sabse pahle aap online aavaedan ke liye sso portal par jayein.
Ab registration karein, registration kaise karein jankaari ke liye link di gyi hai.
Iske bad candidate login page par aae.
Candidate profile mein apna vishay, address, qualification, experience, etc. dekhkar sahi karein.
Ek Baar profile sahi ho jaye phir aap online aavedan ka form bhar sakte hain.
Doosre paper ke liye jankari aavashyak hai.
Ek baar online aavedan sahi ho jaye phir aap online aavedan ka form bhar sakte hain.
Online aavedan complete hone ke baad candidate ka profile dekhkar apne application status ki jaankari dekhenge.
Ab aap ko online aavedan ka status online mei aajayaiga. Jab aapka status 'Online Application Successful ho jayega tab aap online Aavedan shuru kar sakte hain.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Main is recruitment ke liye eligible hoon?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Haan aap is recruitment ke liye eligible hain. Is selection ke liye aapko 18-40 varshon ka huna chahiye. Aap 10+2 (Intermediate) level ka padha hua vyakti hon. Ab aapka avedan online ho jaana hai, iske liye aapko vishay vishay pradarshak ke roop men anujnayen milenge.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Main is recruitment ke liye online aaveedaan kaise karo?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Online Application karna online aavedan ke liye uplabdh hai. Iske liye aapko sso portal par jaana hoga. Ab registration karni hogi, aur candidate login par a jana hoga. Profile sahi hone ki jaankari se pehle hi aapko online aavedan karna hoga. Ab aapke samay ka paalan karna hoga. Lab samay samay par hoga, isliye aapko iske bare mei aakarshit hona hoga.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Main is recruitment ke liye online examination kaise karo?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Exam 9-10 May 2026 tak ho jayega. Ab aapko online aavedan karna hoga. Doose paper ke liye jankari bhi aavashyak hai. Ab aapka online aavedan karna padega, tabhi aapka vishay ka pradarshak aapke liye uplabdh ho jayega.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Is recruitment ke liye kaise koi online help milti hai?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Agar aap online aavedan kaise karne ke bare mein samajh na paa rahay ho tab aapko online help milti hai. Sso portal par jaakare online registration kaam karke aapko online help aavashyak hogii, iske bare mein sahi jaankari payenge.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Is recruitment ke liye exam ke liye online application kitabein kaisi hain?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Exam ke liye online aavedan ke liye online application kitabein uplabdh hain. Iske bare me jankoari aapko online portal par jaakar de khaya ja sakta hai.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Is recruitment ke liye samay ki aavashyakta kya hai?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Is recruitment ke liye samay ki aavashyakta hai jisse aapko online aavedan ki pashchatap pratha ke liye paripakva kar sakte hain. Online exam bhi aapke online aavedan ki paripakvtaa se hoga. Doose paper ke liye jankari bhi aavashyak hai, isliye samay ko samay dene ki jaankari aapko online dekhnei uplabdh hai.

jobs.ai_overview: Agar aap bhi is bharti ka intezar kar rahe the, toh aapke liye acchi khabar hai. UPSSSC ne Junior Assistant ki 2702 poston ke liye recruitment ki hai. Yeh recruitment 2024 ki hai aur apni scorecard ke saath apply karna hoga. Aapki age 18 se 40 taak honi chahiye.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: Bharti mein 2702 post hain aur yeh recruitment UPSSSC PET 2023 scorecard ka basispar hoga. 10+2 intermediate exam pass hone chaahiye, Hindi typing 25 WPM aur English typing 30 WPM karna hoga. NIELIT CCC exam pass hone chaahiye. Competition level thoda zyada hone ki samasya hai, lekin yadi aapka uplabdghat hain, toh iske liye preparation karna zaroori hai. Important dates aur eligibility criteria ka dhyan rakhein.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Agar aap UPSSSC PET 2023 scorecard rakhte hain aur 10+2 intermediate exam pass hain, toh aap is bharti ke liye apply kar sakte hain. jobs.ai_selection_strategy: Syllabus ko samjhein aur apne jokhmo par focus rakhein. Regular practice lein aur apne mistakes ko dhairee karein. Yadi aapke paas NIELIT CCC exam pass hona hai, toh iske liye kuch special focus rakhein.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite: Apne application form ko online aap UPPSC ki official website par bhejein. Apne UPSSSC PET 2023 scorecard ko online submit karein. Apne document ko proper fill up karein aur apke saamne online submit karein. Apne form ko submit hone ke baad, aapka acknowledgement slip aayega.

jobs.ai_meta_description: Delhi Sarkar ke DSSSB Various Post Exam 2026 ki pahli khabar! DSSSB kis vyakti ko recruit karna chahta hai aur uska selection process kya hoga is par jaanne ke liye padhein yaha pustika.
jobs.ai_overview: Agar aap bhi is bharti ka intezar kar rahe the, toh yaha padhkar aapko pata chalega ki DSSSB kaun hain, kis vyakti ko recruit karna chahte hain, aur kya kam karna hoga. Iske alawa, aapko pahle exam date tak ki taiyyariyon ki zaroorat hogi.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: DSSSB ka exam kitna mushkil aur kitna challenging raha hai, yeh sabhi cheezein padhkar samjhein. Jab tak aapko pata na ho ki aapka competition kitna mahatvapurn hoga, tab tak aapko apne best performance ke liye taiyaari karne mein sudharna hi padega.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Agar aapko pata hai ki aapko DSSSB ke post mein recruitment hona hain, toh yeh cheezein padhkar aapko pata chalega ki aapka qualification kis prakaar hona chahiye. Aapko koi khas qualifications ki jarurat hogi ya koi special skills jaruri hain, iske baarein mein padhkar samjhein.
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: Ab iske liye aapko taiyyari ka samay aapko mila hi jayega. Agar aapko samay mil jayega, toh aap apne practice ko aaram se kar sakte hain aur aapke liye taiyari ka samay bhi milti hai, is prakaar aapka best performance hona surajh hai.
jobs.ai_salary_insights: Iske baad jab bhi aapki selection ho jayegi, toh aapko kitne paisa milega yeh bataane ke liye is post mein padhne ke baad aap samajh jaoge. Aapko iske liye apne career planning mein koi special skills ya qualification ka add hona padega.
jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: Agar aapka interview ho jayega, toh aapko pata chalega ki aapko kis post par aapka appointment ho jayega. Yeh cheezein padhkar samajh jao ki aapko kis vyavasay mein kya karna hoga.
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: Iske liye aapko yeh cheezein dhyaan mein rakhne ki zaroorat hogi ki aapko kahan aapko question padhne hain aur kahan aapko kaagaz par likhne hain. Aapko kahan aapko samay milega aur kahan aapko samay ka bachava hona hoga, yeh sabhi cheezein thoda si taiyyari se samjh lein.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite: Iske liye aapko yeh thoda si cheezein yaad rakhni hogi, kyonki iske liye aapko internet ki zaroorat hogi. Aapko kahan aapko click karna hoga aur kahan aapko fill-up karna hoga, iske liye thoda samay mil jayega.

ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Aapko DSSSB ka qualification aur aapka qualification match ki jarurat hoti hai, iske liye aapko thoda samay dena hoga aur iske baare mein padhkar samjh lein.
